name: ZORAIDA
title: BOG WITCH

abilities.name: Bogbound
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may deal 1 damage to an ally within 6". If it does so, reduce the damage dealt to this model by 1.

abilities.name: Eyes in the Night
abilities.text: This model may draw range and LoS for its attack actions from allies within 10".

abilities.name: Strands of Fate
abilities.text: During the start phase, the opposing player must discard a card or play with their control hand revealed until the end phase.

actions.name: Fateweaver's Pull
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Target moves up to 2" and declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Whispered Curses
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to a friendly totem, ignoring LoS.

triggers.name: Premonition
triggers.text: Look at the top card of your fate deck. This model may discard it.

actions.name: Witch's Needle
actions.effects: Attach the Voodoo upgrade to the target.

triggers.name: Ensorcel
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

triggers.name: Poisoned Fate
triggers.text: When resolving, the target must discard a card or this action deals +2 damage.

actions.name: Bogstrider
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within 12" of its current location. Then, this model gains a Craven token.

triggers.name: Stitched Effigy
triggers.text: Remove a marker within 3" of this model. Summon a model with the Effigy characteristic within 3" of this model.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='BOG WITCH' back='Bog Witch'
